title: Jankurai save-gate decision
description: Output of `jankurai audit-file`: a delta-based decision on whether a single candidate file change may land. Consumed by the Jankurai Guard hook.

verdict.description: Outcome class. `block` means the save introduces or worsens a hard finding, or leaves a critical finding in place.

exit_code.description: Process exit code emitted by `jankurai audit-file`: 0 pass, 2 advisory, 3 block. (4 is reserved for internal errors and is not represented in this document.)

path.description: Repo-relative path of the candidate file.

mode.description: The mode the gate ran in.

candidate_score.description: Repo score with the candidate overlaid.

baseline_score.description: Repo score with the last-good content. Absent for a brand-new path with no prior content.

summary.description: One-line human summary of the decision.

new_hard_findings.description: Hard-severity findings the candidate newly introduces.

worsened_findings.description: Findings whose severity the candidate raises into a hard tier.

always_block_findings.description: Pre-existing critical findings the candidate leaves in place.

new_soft_findings.description: Soft-severity findings the candidate newly introduces; surfaced but not blocking.

preexisting_findings.description: Findings present in both the candidate and the baseline that do not block.

rerun_command.description: Command that re-runs this exact check.
